title: Newegg and Best Buy Black Friday Price Promises - Holiday Sales Strategy 2025-2026
text:
Newegg Holiday Sales Strategy - Black Friday and Cyber Monday 2025-2026.

Black Friday Strategy: Newegg runs extended Black Friday promotions with a month-long Black November event. Black Friday in 2025 fell on November 28, with Cyber Monday on December 1.

Price Protection Guarantees: Newegg offers Black Friday Price Protection where if they lower the price on an eligible product marked with the Black Friday Price Protection badge on or before November 30, they will automatically refund you the difference.

Expected Discount Levels: Up to 70% off computer items and accessories during peak sale periods. Standout deals typically available on CPUs, power supplies, and storage with 50%+ savings.

By-Category Strategy: Black Friday features spectacular doorbusters on core components like CPUs, GPUs, and motherboards. Cyber Monday often sees renewed push on deals for laptops, monitors, storage drives, and peripherals.

2026 Holiday Impact: FY2025 results showed strong performance during extended Black Friday promotions, with month-long event driving significant revenue and contributing to 16.9% revenue growth. Management highlighted successful promotional campaigns as a key driver of FY2025 results.

Going Forward: The 2026 holiday season will be critical test of consumer demand absent the GPU shortage-driven demand that boosted 2025. Newegg's promotional effectiveness and inventory management will be closely watched.
